ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the dataset belongs to */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the dataset is part of */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of microscopy data (e.g., SMLM, Fluorescence) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument used to capture the data */,
  "data_status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., pending, processed, archived) */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* A score indicating the quality of the dataset */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample used in the experiment */,
  "imaging_conditions" TEXT /* Imaging conditions and parameters used during the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument used for the experiment */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "sample_preparation" TEXT /* Details of sample preparation */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., .tif, .csv, .zip) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., uploaded, processed, archived) */,
  "file_format_version" TEXT /* Version of the file format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data point belongs to */,
  "frame_number" INTEGER /* Frame number in the dataset */,
  "x_position_nm" REAL /* X position of the data point in nanometers */,
  "y_position_nm" REAL /* Y position of the data point in nanometers */,
  "sigma_nm" REAL /* Sigma value of the data point in nanometers */,
  "intensity_photon" REAL /* Intensity of the data point in photons */,
  "offset_photon" REAL /* Offset value of the data point in photons */,
  "background_std_photon" REAL /* Background standard deviation of the data point in photons */,
  "uncertainty_xy_nm" REAL /* Uncertainty in the X and Y positions of the data point in nanometers */,
  "z_position_nm" REAL /* Z position of the data point in nanometers */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Time stamp of the data point */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation (e.g., label, comment) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "annotated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., pending, reviewed, approved) */,
  "annotation_source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the analysis was performed on */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., particle tracking, intensity analysis) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_results" TEXT /* Detailed results of the analysis */,
  "analysis_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis results */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "analysis_software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used during the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of the comment (e.g., question, observation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the report is generated for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, HTML, CSV) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  "report_version" TEXT /* Version of the report */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sharing event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being shared */,
  "shared_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who shared the dataset */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Name or team of the user who received the dataset */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was shared */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of sharing (e.g., internal, external, team) */,
  "sharing_status" TEXT /* Status of the sharing event (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "sharing_reason" TEXT /* Reason for sharing the dataset */,
  "sharing_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date for the sharing event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
